name: Sappe Public Company Limited
summary: Sappe Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and distributes healthy food and beverage products in Thailand and internationally. The company offers functional drinks under the Sappe Beauti Drink, Sappe Beauti Shot, and St. Anna brands; fruit-flavored vitamin water under the B'lue Water brand; fruit-flavored drinks with aloe vera flesh under the Sappe Aloe Vera Drink brand; fruit and ready-to-drink vegetable juices under the Sappe For One Day brand; juices with coconut jelly under the Mogu Mogu brand; and aromatic coconut water under the All Coco brand. It also provides ready-to-drink coffee powder under the Preaw Coffee and SlimFit Coffee; chlorophyll powder under the Preaw Chlorophyll; and dietary supplement powders under the Sappe Beauti Powder brands. In addition, the company offers jelly for health and beauty purpose under the Beauti Jelly; grilled fish snacks under the ZeaMax; shrimp snacks under the Chimdii; jelly format product for men under the Maxtive; and organic soy pudding under the DeNosh brands, as well as imports, exports, and distributes goods. The company was formerly known as Sapanan General Food Company Limited and changed its name to Sappe Public Company Limited in September 2013. Sappe Public Company Limited was founded in 1988 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
